name: Brandied Peaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Skin peaches by pouring boiling water over a few at a time and allowing to stand for a few minutes. Then dip in cold water and the skins will rub off.
2. After peaches have been skinned, measure them and use one half of their weight in sugar.
3. Place a large, clean, covered stone crock in a cool place.
4. Put in layers of peaches and sugar until all ingredients are used.
5. Pour brandy over the layers.
6. Cover the crock with a heavy piece of white muslin before placing on top.
7. Allow peaches to stand for 2 to 3 months before using.
